Station Registry.cause: All 161 registry stations are validated and geographically bounded within India.

Satellite Collection.cause: GEE sampleRegions() returns no rows for stations entirely covered by monsoon clouds or in orbital gaps on the target date (2026-06-30). Outer join of products results in 135 rows.
Satellite Collection.classification: Expected (due to physical cloud cover and QA masking), but untreated omission causes a downstream matching bug.

Feature Integration.cause: CPCB observations drive the integration; only 12 station observations exist in the latest ground-truth dataset. Feature integration joins satellite predictors by finding the nearest grid point for each of the 12 stations.
Feature Integration.classification: Expected (CPCB observations are the target label bottleneck). However, when GEE data was missing for Mumbai and Patna (before fix), nearest-neighbor matching mapped them to distant cities (Pune/Bhagalpur area) at distances > 50km, which is an implementation bug.

Dataset Preparation.cause: The collocation filter correctly rejects rows where satellite_match_distance_km > 50 km. Mumbai BKC (111 km), Mumbai Colaba (111 km), and Patna Rajbansi Nagar (62 km) were rejected before the fix due to mapping to distant GEE stations.
Dataset Preparation.classification: Expected behavior for collocation filter, but the resulting row loss is a downstream consequence of the collection-stage bug.

fixes_applied: Sentinel rows with NaN satellite features inserted at Stage 2 ensure that missing-satellite stations match to themselves at 0 km distance, leaving satellite features as NaN without matching distant stations, preserving all 12 rows in the final dataset.
